title: Our New App Ideas Directory!
excerpt: We’re excited to share with you a new resource that will help fuel the ideation process of your next app - our revamped App Ides Directory, a curated, continuously updated directory of ideas for solutions you can build o…

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to share with you a new resource that will help fuel the ideation process of your next app - our revamped App Ides Directory, a curated, continuously updated directory of ideas for solutions you can build on monday.com.

The ideas in this directory are based on customer feedback, community requests, and platform gaps that can be potentially addressed with an app.

Whether you’re looking to expand your monday apps portfolio or still researching what will be your first marketplace app, this directory can serve as your starting point! You can research and enhance them, or use them to ignite the inspiration for your app idea.

Visit the app ideas directory

We can’t wait to see what you’ll create💡

*The ideas are provided “as-is” and without warranties or representations of any kind, express or implied. monday.com may already be aware of similar or identical concepts and ideas, which is shared with monday.com, and that monday.com and any third party are free to develop similar applications and ideas, and you or any third party will have no claim against monday.com in connection with the above.

posts.author: Lior_Marketplace (Lior Reiner)
posts.cookedHtml: THIS IS GOLD! Such an amazing opportunity to identify ideas

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for making this, this is so dope.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: We are happy you like it @AnishJ !

posts.author: bradfoster (Brad Foster)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all! Are there any plans to keep this updated? It looks like the last idea added was January 2024. Would be an awesome resource for developers new to the platform looking for direction on an app to build.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @bradfoster,

I checked with the team and this should be updated in the next couple of months. No ETA at the moment

posts.author: MohsinSheikh (Mohsin Sheikh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys, the last update to this board was added more than an year ago. Is there any plan to add new ideas to this board? I have been waiting for so long…

@Matias.Monday
@TomFri

posts.author: karamjittech (Karam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey team!
I noticed the App Ideas Directory is a great starting point, but it seems a bit outdated given how much tech and user needs have evolved.

Would love to see some fresh, forward-thinking ideas added — especially around AI, integrations, automation, and new use cases we’re seeing in 2025. Let’s keep it inspiring!

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! The board was last updated in September/October. While I don’t anticipate a new update in the immediate future, I encourage you to check out our new blog post about finding and validating your next app idea.
